ham:
Library Book Return Notice:

Dear User,

Your borrowed book "The Great Gatsby" was due on 10 Aug. Please return it by 12 Aug to avoid a late fee of ₹5 per day. If you have any questions, reply to this message.

Thank you,
City Library
spam:
URGENT: eSIM Upgrade Required!

Hi there! This is an alert from our eSIM Support Team. Your current eSIM plan is about to expire and you must upgrade to the new 5G eSIM to keep your service active.

Please verify your phone number at <URL> and confirm the upgrade within 24 hours. Failure to do so will result in service interruption.

If you have any questions, reply YES to this SMS or call our support line 988889999.

Thank you for choosing our service!
